It’s been almost six months that I’ve been facing repeated issues with Myntra’s delivery process. Recently I ordered a product that was clearly mentioned to be delivered within 12 hours. However I never received it and suddenly got a message saying the order was cancelled without any explanation. In another instance, I received a defective product that was marked as non-returnable. How is it fair to deny a return when the item itself is damaged? After several calls and unnecessary hassles the return was finally accepted but it took a lot of time and effort. In my latest experience I had multiple items scheduled for delivery within five days. Out of them only one product arrived. One got delayed and two were cancelled with the reason that they were “damaged during delivery.” I wasted so much of my time and effort carefully choosing these items only to end up with incomplete orders. What’s even more frustrating is that when the same products are still available on their portal, Myntra simply cancels and refunds instead of redelivering them. Why should a customer have to reorder and pay again for the same items? This is extremely disappointing, especially when you order for gifting in advance and still face such careless service. Myntra really needs to fix these repeated delivery and cancellation issues, as it’s becoming an exhausting experience for loyal customers. Just refunding the money is not a solution. You can’t play with people’s emotions like this. When we order something, it’s not always just a product sometimes it’s a gift for someone special, sometimes it’s for an occasion we’re excited about or for a trip we’ve been planning. But what do we get instead? Cancellations, delays, and defective products.�You spoil the moments we plan so carefully. The excitement turns into stress, the happiness into disappointment.
